purpose: Machine-readable contract for executor-first paper mission candidates before MAS authority consumption.
machine_boundary: PaperMissionRun records mission identity, objective, candidate artifact deltas, source refs, authority touchpoints, forbidden-write guard, consume result, and claim permissions. It cannot declare publication readiness, submission readiness, current package authority, owner receipt writes, typed blocker writes, human gate writes, controller decisions, publication eval writes, runtime queue writes, provider attempts, or Yang workspace changes.

artifact_delta_ledger.role: candidate artifact deltas proposed by the mission executor
artifact_delta_ledger.non_authority_note: Candidate deltas are not current_package and are not publication-ready until consumed by MAS authority.

source_refs.role: durable refs used to anchor candidate work to study/runtime/source truth without rewriting those truth surfaces

paper_audit_pack.role: expert-auditable paper rigor chain required before MAS authority consumption
paper_audit_pack.fail_closed: Every family must be present, each family status must be non-empty, refs must be a non-empty list of mappings, and every ref must include non-empty ref_id/ref_kind/uri.
paper_audit_pack.non_authority_note: The audit pack is a structured candidate evidence chain. It cannot write or replace publication_eval/latest.json, controller decisions, owner receipts, typed blockers, human gates, current_package, runtime queues, provider attempts, or Yang workspace authority.

paper_mission_transaction.role: The MAS-owned stage terminal decision transaction that converts paper artifact/audit output into an OPL-consumable route command.
paper_mission_transaction.non_authority_note: The transaction carries MAS terminal decision and OPL route command refs, but cannot write owner receipts, typed blockers, human gates, current_package, runtime queues, provider attempts, publication_eval, controller decisions, or Yang authority surfaces.

authority_touchpoints.role: explicit record of MAS/OPL authority surfaces inspected or intentionally not touched by the mission run

consume_result.role: MAS authority consume outcome for a candidate, or an explicit not-consumed/pending state

consumption_ledger.role: Optional governed MAS-side consume evidence written by paper-mission consume-candidate --output-root.
consumption_ledger.non_authority_note: A consumption ledger record binds the candidate consume outcome to durable MAS-owned evidence files. It now includes the same PaperMissionTransaction stage terminal decision, OPL route command, and route handoff packet so OPL can consume a single handoff input. It is not an owner receipt, typed blocker authority file, human gate authority file, publication_eval/latest.json, controller_decisions/latest.json, current_package, OPL outbox/event/StageRun, runtime queue, provider attempt, or paper body patch.
